rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT ANDREW KENNY, GERALDINE QUINEY Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to show that the settlement agreement meets the requirements of Tech-Built. Arguments and evidence referenced in reply will not be considered. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY HAYWOOD VS. RUTH BALLARD SNEED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF MICKEY HAYWOOD DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Defendant to address issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with CCP 430.41 in future, "[b]efore filing a demurrer pursuant to this chapter, the demurring party shall meet and confer in person or by telephone…" =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY HAYWOOD VS. RUTH BALLARD SNEED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF MICKEY HAYWOOD MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is granted with leave to amend to address issues raised by the motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: UNITY HOMES, INC. VS. REGINA MITCHELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT REGINA MITCHELL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No competent evidence provided re: overstatement of rent and failure to properly apply payment tendered. Defendant and Defendant's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in the future. Failure to do so will result in motions being taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 274 BRANNAN STREET OWNER, LLC VS. FORTRESS SF1, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT FORTRESS SF1, LLC, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to March 18, 2020 per stipulation. Parties to present order for execution at the hearing. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. CATALINO ORDONEZ CERRATO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT CATALINO CERRATO, LESLY HERRERA, LESLY CASTRO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Defendant and Defendant's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in the future. Failure to do so will result in motions being taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIEL MARTINEZ VS. JENNIFER CHADWELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT TERRI DEMOTT MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIEL MARTINEZ VS. JENNIFER CHADWELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT JENNIFER CHADWELL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LASHEA RUSSELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 7. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to March 11, 2020 per stipulation of parties. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. CHARLES MULIERI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summ Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 8. DEFENDANT CHARLES MULIERI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summ Adjudication Hearing Required. Defendant and Defendant's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in the future. Failure to do so will result in motions being taken off calendar. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HIMAN SERVICES VS. RAY LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Disco
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 26, 2020 line 9. DEFENDANT RAYMOND LEWIS Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Disco Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in good faith "meet and confer" efforts. =(501/CFH)
